codeReview.summary: The package is well-structured and compiles/tests cleanly, but it does not fully satisfy the feature contract: endpoint coverage target is unmet, request-param coverage is incomplete, and validation was not performed against real API responses.

issues.description: Feature contract requires coverage of 34+ endpoints, but the implementation and tests explicitly lock coverage to 28 (`expect(responseSchemas.length).toBe(28)`). This does not meet the stated requirement.

Request-param schema coverage is incomplete. Only a small subset of request schemas is exported (e.g., pair/vibe/domain/build), while parameterized routes such as `/api/spaces/:space`, `/api/map/:space/:slot`, `/api/versions/:v`, and `/api/traceability/:category/:spec_id` have no corresponding path-param schemas, despite the feature requiring request params and response bodies.

Requirement says to validate schemas against real API responses, but tests use only inline fixtures and parse calls. There is no evidence of API-response capture/validation from live endpoint outputs in the package tests or handoff verification commands.

`DomainInputRequestSchema` allows whitespace-only strings (`z.string().min(1)`), while the backend rejects trimmed-empty input (`String.trim(text) == ""`). Schema and API behavior diverge on this edge case.
`spec_category` is typed as `z.string()` in traceability schemas instead of reusing the stricter `SpecCategorySchema` enum, reducing malformed-response detection strictness.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared docs/contract are inconsistent on API endpoint count, creating requirement ambiguity for this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature spec states "Cover all 34+ endpoints" (`features.json:1372`), architecture also states 34+ (`.factory/library/architecture.md:39,73`), but router currently defines 28 routes (`lib/bropilot/api/router.ex`, 28 `get|post|put` entries).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The TypeScript package skill says to write tests first (RED), but transcript shows code-first flow before tests; this mismatch suggests procedure guidance/enforcement is weak.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill procedure step 3 in `.factory/skills/typescript-packages/SKILL.md` says "Write tests first (RED)", while transcript skeleton shows "create all source files" followed later by test creation.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 413719c. Implementation quality is solid, but the feature does not fully satisfy its contract due to endpoint-count target mismatch, incomplete request-param schema coverage, and lack of validation against real API responses; marked as fail with concrete blocking issues.
